      Modifier and Type Method and Description

    • Uses of CustomException in service

      Methods in service that throw CustomException 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void AccountService.createAccount(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> accountMap)
      Creates a new account using the provided account data.
      void BranchService.createBranch(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> branchMap)
      Creates a new branch with the provided branch data.
      void TransactionService.createTransaction(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> transactionMap)
      Creates a new transaction.
      void UserService.createUser(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> userMap)
      Creates a new user based on the provided map.
      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> FacadeHandler.dashBoardDetails()
      Fetches the dashboard details for the user based on their role.
      void AccountService.deleteAccount(java.lang.Long accountId)
      Deletes an account based on the provided account ID.
      java.lang.Object CacheService.fetchData(java.lang.Object daoInstance, java.lang.String methodName, java.lang.Object... parameters) 
      <T> T CacheService.fetchFromDB(java.lang.Object daoInstance, java.lang.String methodName, java.lang.Object... parameters) 
      java.util.List<Account> AccountService.getAccountDetails(java.lang.Long customerId, java.lang.Long accountNumber, java.lang.Long branchId, java.lang.Long accountCreated)
      Fetches account details based on input parameters.
      java.util.List<Branch> BranchService.getBranchDetails(java.lang.Long branchId)
      Retrieves a list of branches based on the provided parameters.
      java.util.List<Transaction> TransactionService.getTransactionDetails(java.lang.Long id, java.lang.Long accountNumber, java.lang.Long limitValue, java.lang.Long from, java.lang.Long to)
      Retrieves a list of transactions based on the provided criteria.
      java.lang.Object UserService.getUserDetails(java.lang.Long userId)
      Retrieves user details based on the role.
      boolean UserService.updatePassword(java.lang.String currentPassword, java.lang.String newPassword)
      Updates the user's password.
      void UserService.updateUserDetails(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> userMap)
      Updates user details based on the provided map.
      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> UserService.userLogin(java.lang.String username, java.lang.String password)
      Handles user login.
